summary: Comprehensive testing of Inflation Monitor panel with CPI Year-on-Year and Month-on-Month data from SBP APIs. All features working correctly. Backend APIs return live data from State Bank of Pakistan EasyData API. Frontend displays CPI values with interactive modals showing historical charts.
passed_tests: GET /api/cpi-yoy returns 200 status
GET /api/cpi-mom returns 200 status
CPI YoY data contains latest value (7.0%) for February 2026
CPI YoY data contains month-on-month change (+1.2)
CPI YoY data contains year-over-year comparison (1.5% from year ago)
CPI YoY data contains historical data from 2016 onwards
CPI YoY data has source 'State Bank of Pakistan'
CPI YoY data has type 'yoy'
CPI MoM data contains latest value (0.3%) for February 2026
CPI MoM data contains previous month value (0.4%)
CPI MoM data contains historical data with negative values (deflation months)
CPI MoM data has source 'State Bank of Pakistan'
CPI MoM data has type 'mom'
Both YoY and MoM have data for same latest month (February 2026)
Inflation Monitor panel displays in dashboard
CPI YoY indicator shows 7% value with +1.2 change indicator
CPI MoM indicator shows 0.3% value
Clicking CPI YoY opens modal with area chart
CPI YoY modal shows 5% target reference line (yellow dashed line)
CPI YoY modal shows 'Year ago: 1.5%' comparison
Clicking CPI MoM opens modal with bar chart
CPI MoM bar chart shows red bars for positive inflation
CPI MoM bar chart shows green bars for negative inflation (deflation)
Time range selector (YTD, 1Y, 2Y, 5Y, ALL) available in both modals
All time range buttons work correctly
Modal close button (X) works correctly
Modal closes when clicking overlay
seed_data_creation: None needed - CPI data is fetched live from State Bank of Pakistan EasyData API
context_for_next_testing_agent: CPI Inflation Monitor feature fully tested. Live data fetched from SBP EasyData API (easydata.sbp.org.pk) using series codes TS_GP_PT_CPI_M.P00011516 for YoY and TS_GP_PT_CPI_M.P00461516 for MoM. Data available from 2016 onwards (latest base year). YoY uses area chart with 5% target line, MoM uses bar chart with red/green coloring for positive/negative values. API caches data for 1 hour. Both modals support time range filtering.

live_data_verified.source: State Bank of Pakistan EasyData API
